subject: Review request: draft os_operations procedure amendment packet
body: Lane_03 has wrapped NTS-updated os_operations procedure files into a pending amendment packet. Four files are v0.2 DRAFT candidate replacements; AMENDMENT_WORKFLOW_PROCEDURE.md remains skeleton because no local draft update was detected. No procedure is active until NTS approval.
requested_action: Review the amendment packet for governance practicality and executor workflow. Identify required revisions, unsafe ambiguity, and whether the packet should proceed together or be split.
acceptance_criteria: Lane_01 reviews governance practicality for the draft procedure replacements.
Lane_01 reviews executor workflow clarity and operational burden.
Lane_01 identifies required revisions before NTS decision.
Lane_01 recommends one packet or split amendment.
